mapper.select: select id, code, name, provider_type, base_url, status, cast(rate_limit_json as char) as rate_limit_json, cast(quota_json as char) as quota_json, last_operator_id, last_operator_name, updated_at from providers order by id desc

select id, code, name, provider_type, base_url, status, cast(rate_limit_json as char) as rate_limit_json, cast(quota_json as char) as quota_json, last_operator_id, last_operator_name, updated_at from providers where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into providers(code, name, provider_type, base_url, status, rate_limit_json, quota_json, last_operator_id, last_operator_name) values(#{code}, #{name}, #{providerType}, #{baseUrl}, #{status}, #{rateLimitJson}, #{quotaJson}, #{lastOperatorId}, #{lastOperatorName})
mapper.update: update providers set name = #{name}, provider_type = #{providerType}, base_url = #{baseUrl}, status = #{status}, rate_limit_json = #{rateLimitJson}, quota_json = #{quotaJson}, last_operator_id = #{lastOperatorId}, last_operator_name = #{lastOperatorName} where id = #{id}
